name: Wendorf Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: independent (Wendorf family) - retired/exited school bus operations end of 2024 school year
principals: David (Dave) Wendorf (Owner), Sara Wendorf, Rachel Wendorf
districts_or_customers: Merrill Area Public Schools (MAPS) - district has since solicited bids from other companies after Wendorf retirement
recent_news: Wendorf family retired from school bussing at end of 2024 school year after ~65 years operating; Merrill Area Public Schools began soliciting bids from other companies statewide (2024).
fit_notes: No longer a viable tuck-in target - family retired from school bus operations in 2024 and exited the MAPS contract. Not pursuing as independent operator.

name: Chambers Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Delaware DOE school bus contractor (likely Lake Forest / Caesar Rodney area - Felton/Viola, Kent County DE)
recent_news: No notable M&A or news identified; long-standing local Delaware school bus contractor (DOT #500800) operating out of Felton/Viola, DE.
fit_notes: Very small, family-owned DE school bus contractor in Delaware's contractor-based statewide model. Could be a micro tuck-in if Summit wants to enter/expand in DE; succession potential given owner profile. Limited scale (~10 employees).

name: Medivan Transport
districts_or_customers: Texas Medicaid NEMT / private-pay medical patients in Corpus Christi area; hospitals, dialysis centers
recent_news: No M&A news; small local NEMT/EMS operator in Corpus Christi providing emergency and non-emergency medical transport including wheelchair service.
fit_notes: Not a fit - NEMT/EMS ambulance operator, not student transportation. No school district or SPED contracts identified. Outside Summit's K-12 student-transport thesis.

name: Act Wheelchair Taxi LLC
owner_or_parent: independent (likely d/b/a of Act Medical Transport Service LLC)
districts_or_customers: Greenville/Upstate SC area private-pay and Medicaid NEMT patients
recent_news: No notable news; small wheelchair taxi/medical transport operator in Travelers Rest, SC. Appears related to/same entity as Act Medical Transport Service LLC.
fit_notes: Not a fit - wheelchair taxi/NEMT operator, not a K-12 school bus or SPED student-transport contractor. Outside Summit's thesis.

name: Academy Bus
owner_or_parent: Tedesco Trust (Francis Tedesco & Mark Tedesco lifetime beneficiaries); parent Academy Bus LLC controls Academy Express LLC, Academy Lines LLC, Number 22 Hillside LLC
principals: Frank Tedesco (founder, 1968); Francis Tedesco; Mark Tedesco
recent_news: Largest privately owned motorcoach operator in North America with 1,000+ coaches, 20 locations Boston-Miami, 2,000+ employees. Acquired Go Buses (2014) and Daniel's Charters & Tours assets (2018). Selected as Rutgers student shuttle provider (multi-year agreement).
fit_notes: Not a tuck-in target - Academy is a very large ($190M+) motorcoach/commuter/charter operator, not a K-12 yellow school bus contractor. It is itself an acquirer (Go Buses, Daniel's Charters). Note: source address 'Palo Alto, CA' is incorrect - HQ is Hoboken, NJ. Out of scope for Summit's tuck-in thesis.
